name: Sarsi

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Sarsi (sars1236).

notes: Skeleton. Northern Athabaskan (Dene) language of Alberta, self-named Tsuutʼina, in its practical orthography. Lateral obstruents (tł, tł', ł=[ɬ]), affricate series and ejectives written with a following apostrophe, and gh=[ɣ] are mapped. Tsuutʼina is strongly tonal, but tone (and nasalization) is not reliably recovered from this orthography and is left unencoded, giving a high PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
